me.name: me
me.description: Greet yourself in your preferred language.
me.tip: 💡 Use `/locale set` to change your language.

user.name: user
user.reply: 👋 Hey, {{target}}! **{{author}}** says hello to you in `{{locale}}`.
user.self: ❌ You cannot greet yourself with this command — use `/greet me` instead.

set.name: set
set.done: ✅ Your language has been set to **{{locale}}**.

info.name: info
info.reply:
🌐 **Your locale:** `{{locale}}`
📋 **Available locales:** {{available}}
🔤 **Default locale:** `{{default}}`

*This message was rendered with `tUser()` — it uses your stored preference.*
